string 2: Ah, there ya are. I've been waiting.
Master, what is this place...?

A friend of mine is inside. I'm thinking about going in to
check on how he's doing.
{next}Are you sure this is okay?
{next}Who's the friend?
{next}Here? Not a great place...

Okay for me to have a human friend? Actually, I have a lot
of human friends. No problemo.

He's a human, but his actual name isn't really clear. He
uses all kind of fake names.

Not for an ordinary human, but my friend is one of the
tougher ones. I'm sure he's fine.
We met by chance and somehow hit it off in a strange way.

He ended up becoming the human I know best, so I wanna see
how he's been faring.

I'll choose who to side with depending on the outcome—with Alphamon,
who is assessing the humans, or King Drasil, who wants to protect them.
{next}I get it.
{next}That person has a big responsibility.
{next}That's a wild way of deciding.

You and Jesmon are gonna be witnesses representing the human
and Digimon sides!

Oh. By the way, don't tell my friend about this. I wanna see
his true reactions.

I like to be bold. That's probably why I get along so well
with that human.
Ya understand what's going on now? Let's go, then.
Leave?
[Don't leave.]
{end}[Leave.]
Are ya ready now? Let's go, then.

Welcome back! This bar is 4,000 digi per hour! Would you
like to come in?
{next}4,000 "digi"?
{next}I see. So that's the theme of this bar, huh?
{next}I think I'd rather leave.

Also known as "YEN"! But we have to keep the dream
alive, no? So we call it "digi" here!
Aww, don't spell it all out like that! That's boring! ♪

Aww, too bad! I'm afraid you can't leave without ordering
something! ♪

Sorry to interrupt you. We just need to take a look around
the bar.
Wait. What is this, some kind of raid...?

Nah, it's nothing like that. I just wanna see something...
Hey, that's the guy!

Whoo! Which one do ya wanna drink, pink or gold? I'll pop
open whichever one ya want!

I am not familiar with these kinds of places, but... I smell
danger!

Aww, that's so sweet of you! But why don't we have more
after you get the bill paid first?

Okie-dokie! No problem! I'm the richest guy in town!
*hiccup*
All right! Your bill so far comes to 48,000 digi! ♪
Sure, 48,000 digi. That's nothin—
Wait. What?!
{next}He looks surprised...
{next}He probably can't pay.
{next}Humanity will perish...
He sure doesn't disappoint. Lemme go talk to him a bit.
That seems weird... I'll go ask him about it.

Now, you have to stay out of this. My decision has to be
impartial.
Hey there. How've ya been?

Pretty good... Wait! You're the guy from the other night!
...Um, can I borrow some money?
Well, it depends on the reason. What do ya need it for?

It's so much fun being with these barmaids... I wanna stay
here longer!
Is that so? Well, how much do ya have right now?
That's weird. Is that really all ya have?

Ya won big time in the arena the other day because of me.
What happened to that money?

Well, I was spending it here, but before I knew it, things
ended up like this...

This money was supposed to be for my kid's tuition... My
wife will kill me!

Hey, you should fight a fixed match at the arena! We can
split the profit. Not bad, eh?
Hmm... This is quite...
{next}A perfect example of a horrible person.
{next}Looks like there's no excuse for him.
{next}Humanity is foolish, after all...

Following the path of pleasure while ya have a family at
home... This is quite serious...

Master, it seems you have chosen quite an extraordinary
person for the final judgment.

Why do you look so happy?! You and the rest of humanity are
in big trouble right now!

Well, I've decided. I've learned all I need to know about
humans.

W-Wait, Master! Please reconsider! There are all kinds of
humans, you know!

This person was kind enough to tell me how to order ramen,
for example!

I know that, idiot. I'm saying I can't leave such weak
creatures to their own devices!
...What?

It's easy to destroy humanity, but it's more fun to train
guys like this into real men!
Whaaat?!
{next}Has humanity just been saved?
{next}Your master is amusing.
{next}A surprise "not guilty" verdict, huh?

Apparently, he was so awful that it flipped a switch inside
my master's head.

Well, my master IS the type that can be friends with that
weird guy, after all...

I honestly think he HAS been found guilty. Is my master
doing the right thing, here...?

Humans are such fun creatures. I can't let Digimon destroy
them.
I'll help ya, buddy. Let's bring this place down!

Woo hoo! Let's do it! No need to pay my bill if this place
is shut down!
No way! These guys are crazy! Help me, Kuzuhamon!

Gentlemen. You're acting a bit too naughty. Bad boys need to
be punished, right?

I'll instill so much fear into you that you'll never
misbehave again!
Th-Thanks for helping me out... Hehe...

If ya learned a lesson today, let it be to not ever use yer
kid's money again.

I promise. Sorry to ask, but can I borrow money for the
train? I'll pay ya back soon...

Sure. But ya better pay it back or I'll go to yer house to
collect when yer wife is home.

Whew. I don't ever expect to see that money again, but I'm
not telling him that.

Anyway, I've decided to support humanity. Which means I'm
gonna support YOU, too!

Well, Jesmon, let's get to the rendezvous point. I noticed in
that fight you've grown a lot.

Th-Thank you, Master! Perhaps the ramen I ate in Akihabara
helped!

I didn't know ramen had such an effect. Human food has
unpredictable power, I guess.
